plugins.name: Design Doctrine
plugins.purpose: Turns repeated product-design feedback into reusable rules.
plugins.whenToUse: When designing, building, or reviewing product UI against personal design judgment.
plugins.visual: Rule cards in a sidebar panel

personalization.adaptInstruction: Turn each durable signal into a versioned rule under rules/<domain>/ following governance.md, or clear rules/ first to grow doctrine from your own judgment. Leave the bundled design-doctrine skill in place; it reads whatever rules you keep. Rules carry short, anonymous evidence lines only.

plugins.name: Improve Prompt
plugins.purpose: Rewrites a rough composer draft into a context-complete prompt.
plugins.whenToUse: When a request is underspecified or needs a clearer handoff before sending.
plugins.visual: Improve action with an in-composer progress shimmer

personalization.adaptInstruction: Fold each durable signal into skills/prompt-shaper/SKILL.md — tighten a role's include-when, add or narrow a rule, or fix a stopping convention. Do not touch the composer runtime; only the skill changes. The plugin runtime and the skill are separate parts.

plugins.name: Omegacode
plugins.purpose: Monitors Omegacode workflows globally while keeping live composer progress owner-scoped.
plugins.whenToUse: When scanning workflows across threads or following the run owned by the current thread.
plugins.visual: Global workflow list plus a live phase and worker card above the owning composer

plugins.name: Thread Hover Cards
plugins.purpose: Previews thread status and repository context from the sidebar.
plugins.whenToUse: When scanning several active threads without opening each one.
plugins.visual: Hover card beside a sidebar thread row

plugins.name: UI Patterns
plugins.purpose: Browses and queries approved-source UI components and interaction patterns.
plugins.whenToUse: When choosing, comparing, or citing established UI patterns.
plugins.visual: Interactive component cards in a thread panel
